question: How many plants did I initially plant for tomatoes and cucumbers?

retrieval_results.context:
The user initially planted five tomato plants
The user harvests cucumbers daily from their garden
The user harvests tomatoes almost daily and uses them in salads, sandwiches, and cooked meals
The user uses tomato cages, trellises, or stakes to support upright growth
User finds homegrown tomatoes more flavorful than store-bought tomatoes
The user cut back the watering schedule, leading to healthier tomato plants
The user rotates tomato crops annually to prevent soil nutrient depletion and disease buildup
